text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm heading over to the track for some
training...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: One... Two... And step!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This won't do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I think you're doing just fine. You're still not
satisfied?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My legs are lagging behind on the beat. Perhaps
I've been paying too much attention to my upper
body.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I need to start over with the basics. Please come
watch again in a few days.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Next, I would like you to observe my running
form. All right, here I go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wait a minute! What do you mean you want me
to observe your form?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Well, what did you think?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what to say. You were... normal, I
guess?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I see. I take it you mean there were no issues with
my form.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Moving on, I'd like you to comment on my
conduct and posture when I study. After that will
be my culinary abilities...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
H-hold on a second! Studying and culinary what
now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To tell you the truth, I've agreed to an in-depth
special feature for a magazine...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I was told they were going to report on my daily
routine along with my running and dancing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If there are readers looking forward to this
special, it wouldn't be fair of me to disappoint
them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Right... So that's why you're asking me to do all of
this?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But if I were one of the readers, I don't think I'd
necessarily want to see you pulling off everything
flawlessly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...What do you mean by that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm saying that your own expectations are
different from everyone else's.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wouldn't having "expectations" mean that they
like you? Nobody's going to be disappointed just
because they see you struggling.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What I think the readers are looking forward to
seeing is the real you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: The... real me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, after listening to you, I feel like all my
pent-up anxiety has melted away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I'll show everyone the real me, like you
said.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's more like it. Being relaxed is the best
approach. Just like when you're stuffing your face
at a dessert buffet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I-I would never dream of exposing that side of
me!
